label: Data Abstraction
description: The process of hiding irrelevant details from the user. It shows only necessary information to the user and hiding all the irrelevant details from the user.

label: Data Independence
description: Users and data should not directly interact with each other.

label: Database Management System (DBMS)
description: A system where data abstraction will work.

label: Levels of Data Abstraction
description: Total three levels in database management system: View level, conceptual level and physical level.

label: Physical Level
description: The lowest level of data abstraction. It defines how data are stored, decides location in memory, and whether data will be centralized or distributed.

label: Conceptual Level
description: Defines what data are stored into the database and what are the relationships exist among this data. It decides the structure of entire database.

label: View Level
description: Tells the application about how data should be shown to the user. There are multiple views of the same database.

label: Database Administrator (DBA)
description: Decides which data should be kept at which particular disk drive. Handles physical level, conceptual level and logical level.

label: Irrelevant Details
description: Details hidden from the user by data abstraction, such as where data will be physically stored or what types of data model will be used.

label: Necessary Information
description: Essential information that users know, not the irrelevant details.

label: User
description: Present on the view level. Users are not directly interact with the physical level.

label: Database
description: Directly connected to the physical level. Physical data will be stored at physical level.

label: Programmer/Developer
description: Handle conceptual level and logical level.

label: Database Structure
description: The structure of entire database, including tables and their columns, and relationships between tables, decided in the logical level.

label: Database Queries
description: Different types of queries like Select, Insert, Update, Delete performed in logical level.

label: Security
description: Increases in the view level because authority for editing, changes, and modification is given to specific roles.

label: Server
description: Is a logical level. Fetches the answer of information through the database.
